title: picris hirta
intro: Picris hirta, also known as Rough Hawksbeard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Picris hirta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
